scripts.db:migrate:crm: docker exec -i cosmeticos_postgres psql -U admin -d cosmeticos_db -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /dev/stdin < database/migrations/20260406_crm_schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:all: sh -c 'for f in database/migrations/*.sql; do echo Running $f; docker exec -i cosmeticos_postgres psql -U admin -d cosmeticos_db -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /dev/stdin < "$f"; done'
